overall.description: A first-person driving sequence through a desert highway at dusk in a video game environment (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves steadily past abandoned industrial structures and power lines toward a distant city skyline, passing a weathered billboard and palm trees along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned industrial zone alongside desert highway

events.description: passing the last of the abandoned industrial structures, entering open desert road

agents.ego_description: driving along the desert highway past abandoned buildings with satellite dishes and solar panels

entered.detail: dilapidated building with satellite dishes and solar panels on the roof
twin power cables running overhead along the highway
wooden electrical poles lining both sides of the road
metal fencing surrounding the abandoned property
tall futuristic glass building visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment begins driving past an abandoned industrial structure with satellite dishes on the right, enclosed by a chain-link fence. Power lines run overhead along the desert highway, while a distant futuristic city skyscraper is visible on the horizon against the colorful dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert highway with power infrastructure

agents.ego_description: cruising along the straight desert road lined with utility poles toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: tall palm trees appearing along the right roadside
large mountain range forming the distant backdrop

segments.scene_description: Traveling along an open desert highway with continuous power lines and utility poles lining both sides. The abandoned structures have receded behind, and palm trees begin to appear on the right while mountains become visible in the background.

events.description: large weathered billboard reading 'ROCKY RIDGE' comes into view on the right

agents.ego_description: driving past palm trees and alongside a large weathered billboard on the right

entered.detail: large weathered wooden billboard with 'ROCKY RIDGE' text and arrow

segments.scene_description: The highway continues through a section with palm trees on the right and a prominent weathered billboard advertising 'ROCKY RIDGE'. The power lines continue overhead, and the road remains straight with the mountain range visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert road approaching mountain range

events.description: passing the Rocky Ridge billboard, entering more open mountain terrain

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway as the road curves slightly toward the mountains ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the highway continuing toward the large mountain range in the distance. The billboard and palm trees have passed behind, leaving an open desert landscape with power lines still running parallel to the road as it curves gently toward the mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a desert highway that transitions from an industrial periphery into a vast, open wilderness beneath a colorful dusk sky. It begins by passing an abandoned industrial complex enclosed by chain-link fences and satellite dishes, with a futuristic skyscraper looming on the distant horizon. As the industrial structures recede, the landscape opens up to reveal utility poles lining the road and palm trees appearing on the right against a backdrop of emerging mountains. The scene then shifts past a weathered billboard advertising Rocky Ridge before the greenery fades away, leaving only the straight stretch of highway. Finally, the camera moves through the empty desert landscape as the road curves gently toward the imposing mountain range in the distance.
